mapper.select: SELECT product_id AS productId, location_id AS locationId, available_qty AS availableQty, damaged_temp_qty AS damagedTempQty, last_event_id AS lastEventId, last_event_type AS lastEventType, updated_at AS updatedAt, updated_by AS updatedBy FROM inventory_current WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND location_id = #{locationId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO inventory_current ( product_id, location_id, available_qty, damaged_temp_qty, last_event_id, last_event_type, updated_by ) VALUES ( #{productId}, #{locationId}, #{availableQty}, #{damagedTempQty}, #{lastEventId}, #{lastEventType}, #{updatedBy} )
mapper.select: SELECT product_id AS productId, location_id AS locationId, available_qty AS availableQty, damaged_temp_qty AS damagedTempQty, last_event_id AS lastEventId, last_event_type AS lastEventType, updated_at AS updatedAt, updated_by AS updatedBy FROM inventory_current ORDER BY product_id, location_id LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
